chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 219 of 2022 SCRA 474 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25. 2. For orders on CMA No.1406/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1407/2022. 28.01.2026 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant. Ms. Mona Mehfooz, Collector of Customs, Appraisement West, Karachi. Pursuant to order dated 15.12.2025 learned Collector is present and states that reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
